lclinkedin-chrome-copilot

macOS Chrome copilot plugin for Claude Code. PII-gated. Pedro-paste-only sends. Delegates browser I/O to claude-mac-chrome.

shellmacOS 13+MITPII-scan CI gate
github.com/yolo-labz/linkedin-chrome-copilot
pattern
copilot orchestrator over five single-purpose skills
trade-off
macOS-only + operator-paste sends, in exchange for ban-risk resistance on a watched account
guardrails
YAML policy verdict · channel-aware register · timezone-labeled slots · keyword-coverage variants
supply chain
PII-scan CI hard gate · JSON Schema draft-07 fixture validation · DCO sign-off + Co-Author trailer
